traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to Necrotic damage and Radiant damage.

traits.name: Healing Hands
traits.description: As an action, you can touch a creature and cause it to regain a number of Hit Points equal to your character level. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Light Bearer
traits.description: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Charge
traits.description: If you move at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then hit it with an attack on the same turn, that target takes an extra 1d6 damage of the attack's type.

traits.name: Equine Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift. In addition, you have Advantage on saving throws made to avoid being knocked Prone.

traits.name: Hooved Step
traits.description: You ignore the extra movement cost of moving through difficult terrain created by non-magical rubble, undergrowth, or similar plant growth.

traits.name: Shapechanger
traits.description: As an action, you can change your appearance: height, weight, facial features, the sound of your voice, and other distinguishing characteristics, all within the bounds of your size category. You stay this way until you use this trait again, become Incapacitated, or die. The new form doesn't change any of your game statistics.

traits.name: Changeling Instincts
traits.description: You gain proficiency in two of the following skills of your choice: Deception, Insight, Performance, Persuasion.

traits.name: Unsettling Visage
traits.description: When a creature you can see hits you with an attack roll, you can take a Reaction to let your features ripple unnervingly, giving that creature Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Fairy Flight
traits.description: You have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed. You can't use this Fly Speed if you're wearing Heavy armor.

traits.name: Innate Charm
traits.description: You know the Friends cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the effects of spells.

traits.name: Mirthful Leaps
traits.description: Your jump distance is doubled, and you don't need a running start to make a long or high jump.

traits.name: Ram's Headbutt
traits.description: Your Unarmed Strike can deal 1d4 Bludgeoning damage instead of its normal damage. On a hit, you can push the target up to 5 feet away from you.

traits.name: Cat's Claws
traits.description: You have a Climb Speed of 20 feet, and your Unarmed Strike can deal 1d4 Slashing damage instead of its normal damage.

traits.name: Feline Agility
traits.description: Your reflexes and agility allow you to move with a burst of speed. When you move on your turn, you can double your Speed until the end of that turn. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you move 0 feet on one of your turns.

traits.name: Cat's Talent
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Perception or Stealth skill (your choice).

traits.name: Natural Armor
traits.description: You have tough, shell-like skin. While you aren't wearing armor, your base Armor Class is 17. You can't benefit from wearing body armor, but you can still use a Shield.

traits.name: Claws
traits.description: Your Unarmed Strike can deal 1d4 Slashing damage instead of its normal damage.

traits.name: Hold Breath
traits.description: You can hold your breath for up to 1 hour.

traits.name: Flight
traits.description: You have a Fly Speed of 30 feet. You can't use this Fly Speed if you're wearing Heavy armor.

traits.name: Silent Feathers
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Stealth skill.

traits.name: Keen Sight
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Fury of the Small
traits.description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll and that creature is larger than you, you can deal extra damage to it equal to your character level. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

traits.name: Nimble Escape
traits.description: You can take the Disengage or Hide action as a Bonus Action.

traits.name: Shifting
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, you can assume a more bestial appearance for 1 minute. For the duration, you gain Temporary Hit Points equal to your character level plus your Constitution modifier, and your Speed increases by 10 feet. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.
